escalation.rationale: Iran conflict day 82 continues with Trump setting peace deadline while Iran warns of new fronts and Israeli strikes kill 19 in Lebanon.

ticker_items: Trump gives Iran 2-3 days for peace deal as Tehran warns of new fronts
Israeli strikes kill 19 including children in southern Lebanon
Iran submits peace proposal demanding reparations and sanctions lifting
US gas prices surge 56% to $4.52/gallon due to Iran conflict
Pentagon reduces Europe Brigade Combat Teams from four to three

new_entrant.text: Pakistan deployed 8,000 troops and fighter jets to Saudi Arabia under mutual defense treaty.

middle_east.description: Israeli airstrikes killed 19 people including women and children in southern Lebanon.

russia.text: Russia Ready to Help Out With U.S.-Iran Talks
russia.speaker: Deputy Foreign Minister
russia.title: Deputy Foreign Minister

middle_east.text: Iran can spread war far beyond the Middle East with devastating blows if Israel and US resume attacks
middle_east.speaker: IRGC
middle_east.title: Revolutionary Guard statement

middle_east.text: Iran had not yet used all the capabilities of the Islamic Revolution against the West
middle_east.speaker: IRGC
middle_east.title: Revolutionary Guard statement

observers.description: Pakistan deployed 8,000 troops, fighter jet squadron, and Chinese air defense systems to Saudi Arabia under mutual defense treaty. Deployments began in early April and enhance Pakistani military presence in the region.

Xi Jinping signed multiple deals with Putin during state visit, reportedly more than Trump secured during his China visit. Chinese tankers exiting Strait of Hormuz amid Iran tensions signals cautious approach.

financial.brent_crude: Declining on Iran peace talks progress
financial.notes: Oil prices eased following positive signals from White House on Iran deal progress and Chinese tanker movements in Gulf.

update_log.text: Trump gives Iran 2-3 days deadline for peace deal as Tehran warns of opening new fronts
Israeli airstrikes in southern Lebanon kill 19 including women and children
Iran submits formal peace proposal demanding reparations and sanctions lifting
Pentagon reduces Brigade Combat Teams in Europe from four to three
